# GEDitCOM GEDCOM 5.5 Torture Test

## Description
Comprehensive torture test file for GEDCOM 5.5 parsers. Designed to exercise every GEDCOM 5.5 tag in every possible location to thoroughly test parser robustness and compliance with the GEDCOM 5.5 specification.

## Test Case Type
- **Parser stress testing**: Edge cases and corner cases
- **Comprehensive tag testing**: Tests all GEDCOM 5.5 tags and their valid locations
- **Specification compliance**: Validates parser adherence to GEDCOM 5.5 standard
- **Torture test**: Extreme test case covering complex scenarios

## File Information
- **GEDCOM Version**: 5.5
- **Format**: `.ged` (standard GEDCOM text format)
- **Size**: ~66 KB
- **Encoding**: ANSEL (character set testing)
- **Source Software**: GEDitCOM 2.9.4

## Provenance
- **Source**: GEDitCOM.com GEDCOM Torture Tests
- **URL**: https://www.geditcom.com/gedcom.html
- **Availability**: Public test files
- **Purpose**: Parser validation and testing

## License & Usage
- **License**: Public test files
- **Attribution**: GEDitCOM software
- **Usage Rights**: Educational and testing purposes
- **Restrictions**: None specified for educational use

## Testing Coverage
- **All GEDCOM 5.5 tags**: Comprehensive tag coverage in valid locations
- **Tag combinations**: Every valid tag/parent relationship
- **Edge cases**: Boundary conditions and extreme scenarios
- **Character encoding**: ANSEL character set encoding
- **Record types**: All record types (INDI, FAM, SOUR, etc.) with all valid tags
- **Nesting levels**: Deep nesting and complex structures

## Notes
- This is a professional torture test specifically designed for parser testing
- Extremely valuable for ensuring parser completeness and correctness
- Tests not just parsing but proper handling of all GEDCOM elements
- Should be used to verify full specification compliance
- Line ending format: CR (carriage return) - good for cross-platform testing
- Not intended to represent realistic genealogical data
- Essential for comprehensive parser validation testing
